license_or_access: Open public download; cite original CGMDB resource
key_fields: glucose, subject, foods, mitigator, food, rep, mins_since_start | meta: id, HbA1c, fasting glucose, fasting insulin, BMI, Systolic bp, Diastolic bp, Total cholesterol
recommended_use_in_project: External controlled food/mitigator challenge validation; response heterogeneity; link PPGR with metabolic phenotype and omics.
main_limitation: Controlled food challenge, not free-living CGMacros-style meal logs; no full meal macro table.

license_or_access: Zenodo public record; see LICENSE.md in dataset
size_or_scale: participants~16; glucose files=17 rows=356146; nutrition files=15 rows=4351; bolus files=16 rows=5660; activity files=17; sleep files=33; basal files=14
key_files: Glucose Data/*.csv; Nutrition Data/*.csv; Insulin Data/Bolus Data/*.csv; Activity Data/*.csv; Sleep Data/*.csv
key_fields: meal_ts, meal_type, meal_tag, carbs_g, prot_g, fat_g, fibre_g; bg_ts, value; bolus_ts, bolus_dose
recommended_use_in_project: High-priority external PPGR method validation with meal macros, CGM, insulin, activity and sleep; supports robustness and confounding analyses.
main_limitation: T1D population differs from CGMacros; insulin and disease state require stratified or transfer-validation framing.

size_or_scale: T1DM visit files=16; T2DM visit files=109; includes two summary workbooks
key_fields: CGM time series in participant workbooks; summary workbooks with clinical/lab characteristics
recommended_use_in_project: Chinese diabetes external reference cohort; useful for CGM phenotype distribution, disease-state robustness and cross-population positioning.
main_limitation: No explicit meal macro logs; best used for CGM phenotype/external disease reference rather than meal-level PPGR prediction.

size_or_scale: participants=9; glucose rows=8221; food rows=115; insulin rows=126; food images=106
recommended_use_in_project: External image-linked meal/CGM/insulin benchmark; useful for food-photo alignment, semi-quantitative meal annotation and PPGR window extraction.
main_limitation: Small T1D sample; food data has calories/descriptions rather than full macro composition.

key_fields: MealTime, CalEnergy, TotalCarbs, TotalProtein, TotalDietFiber, AvailCarb, GlycIndexGlucose, GlycLoadGlucose
recommended_use_in_project: Feature engineering reference for glycemic index/load, available carbohydrate and nutrient composition; compare CGMacros meal distributions.
main_limitation: No CGM paired with meals in this downloaded nutrition archive; not a PPGR outcome validation set.

dataset: Jaeb CGM in healthy nondiabetic adults
size_or_scale: CGM rows=385292; participant-log rows=1694; screening rows=171
key_fields: PtID, DeviceDtDaysFromEnroll, DeviceTm, Value; Breakfast_Time/Lunch_Time/Dinner_Time/Snack times; HbA1c/BMI/sex/race
recommended_use_in_project: Healthy CGM reference range; pseudo-meal windows around logged meals/snacks; compare CGMacros glycemic excursion magnitude to non-diabetic baseline.
main_limitation: Meal log times but no nutrient macros; limited for macro-response modeling.

dataset: Jaeb CGM in healthy young children
recommended_use_in_project: Optional pediatric normoglycemia reference; may support sensitivity checks only.
main_limitation: Pediatric population is not aligned with adult CGMacros; lower priority.

license_or_access: Academic dataset; local copy already in project
key_fields: CGM, insulin, carbs and event annotations depending on subject/year
recommended_use_in_project: T1D external validation/sanity benchmark already integrated in project; retain as disease-state comparator.
main_limitation: T1D rather than general nutrition cohort; current project notes it as lightweight validation unless full harmonization is implemented.

license_or_access: Mendeley Data, CC BY 4.0 page; interactive/API access issue during automated download
size_or_scale: 25 T1D adults, at least 14 days; CGM, insulin, meal carbohydrates, steps, calories, heart rate and sleep per data description
key_files: CGM; insulin; meals; wearable activity/sleep files
key_fields: meal carbohydrates; CGM; insulin dose; steps/calories/heart rate/sleep
recommended_use_in_project: Very high-priority next dataset for multimodal external PPGR validation, similar role to T1D-UOM/HUPA cross-validation.
main_limitation: Automated file-tree download was blocked by Mendeley public API/session handling; download manually or use authenticated browser export.
